title: identity: hpke_secret_bytes and to_secret_bytes_64 return plain arrays; callers do not zeroize
description: hpke_secret_bytes() returns [u8;32] and to_secret_bytes_64() returns [u8;64]. Multiple callers hold these in plain locals not wrapped in Zeroizing: tui/src/main.rs:124 holds hpke_secret for session lifetime, cli/src/commands.rs:232 holds hpke_identity_secret for session lifetime. Identity.hpke_secret (StaticSecret) zeroizes on drop, but copies via these methods do not. Fix: change return types to Zeroizing<[u8;32]> and Zeroizing<[u8;64]>.
